statement.p: A restaurant stocks its pantry with {100\ {\rm lb}} of onions. When the supply reaches {20\ {\rm lb}}\text{,} its time to order more. Recently, the restaurant has been using {8\ {\rm lb}} of onions per day. How long since restocking will it take until another order must be placed? Write an equation to model this scenario. There is no need to solve it.
